items.q: How long does a typical project take?
items.a: A simple web design project usually takes 2-4 weeks. Complex AI automations can take 4-8 weeks, depending on scope and integration depth.
Yes, we work with clients from all over the world. Digital tools make distance no obstacle to premium results.

items.q: Which AI models do you use?
items.a: We primarily use Google Gemini Pro and GPT-4. For specific use cases, we also use open-source models or specialized interfaces.

about.title: We are Zetta Digital.
about.subtitle: A boutique agency at the intersection of design, technology, and artificial intelligence. We help forward-thinking companies overcome digital barriers.
about.mission_desc: Our mission is to make complex technologies like AI accessible and usable. We don't just build websites or bots; we create digital experiences and automated systems that enable real growth and create time for what matters most.
about.vision_desc: We see a world where technology works seamlessly in the background, amplifying human potential. Zetta Digital strives to be the leading partner for companies that want to not only keep up but actively shape the digital change.
